meta.title: DEVLINI | Mariane Belini
meta.description: Portfolio of Mariane Ramalho Belini (DEVLINI): full-stack developer and founder of controledegado.app. Projects, links and contact.

ads.emptyDescription: Your product in this spot, from R$ 19

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js — open source soon

thanks.paidBody: Your slot is reserved. Now send your ad artwork through the link below — after approval (within 24h), the card goes live. You'll also get this link by email.
thanks.genericBody: If you completed a payment, the artwork submission link will arrive in your email. Questions? Reach me via the footer email.

artForm.title: Your ad artwork
artForm.body: Fill in the card details. After approval (within 24h) it goes live automatically.
artForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: What it does, in one line
artForm.imageHint: Square works best in the card.
artForm.success: Artwork received! I'll review it within 24h and the card goes live automatically. You'll get an email once it's approved.
artForm.genericError: Couldn't submit. Check the fields and try again.
artForm.imageTooLarge: The image exceeds 500 KB — compress it and try again.
artForm.invalidBody: This artwork submission link isn't valid. Use the link from your confirmation email or contact me.

advertise.title: Advertise to people who build
advertise.subtitle: Understated ad cards, in front of an audience of developers, recruiters and creators who follow my work.
advertise.honesty: Recently launched site: prices below are launch prices, and audience numbers will be published here monthly — never inflated.
advertise.emailSubject: I want to advertise on Link Hub

week: Card in the sidebar slot on every page

quarter: Card in the sidebar slot on every page

specs: Square image (1:1), PNG or JPG, up to 500 KB
Destination URL (with or without your own UTM)
policy: Every ad is reviewed within 24h; if declined, you get a full refund
how: Pick a plan and reach out by email
